'''wajulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mbuga|mbuga]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mbuga|mbuga]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wajulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæjilith|wæjilith]] || [[word:wæjilij|wæjilij]] || [[word:wæjilish|wæjilish]] || [[word:wæjili|wæjili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wajujuluth|wajujuluth]] || [[word:wajujuluj|wajujuluj]] || [[word:wajujulush|wajujulush]] || [[word:wajujulu|wajujulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wajuluth|wajuluth]] || [[word:wajuluj|wajuluj]] || [[word:wajulush|wajulush]] || [[word:wajulu|wajulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wajufluth|wajufluth]] || [[word:wajufluj|wajufluj]] || [[word:wajuflush|wajuflush]] || [[word:wajufluf|wajufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wajuluthu|wajuluthu]] || [[word:wajuluju|wajuluju]] || [[word:wajulushu|wajulushu]] || [[word:wajuluku|wajuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wajuluth|wajuluth]] || [[word:wajuluj|wajuluj]] || [[word:wajulush|wajulush]] || [[word:wajulu|wajulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wajuluthul|wajuluthul]] || [[word:wajulujul|wajulujul]] || [[word:wajulushul|wajulushul]] || [[word:wajulukul|wajulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wajuluthuthu|wajuluthuthu]] || [[word:wajulujuju|wajulujuju]] || [[word:wajulushushu|wajulushushu]] || [[word:wajuluku|wajuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wajuluthun|wajuluthun]] || [[word:wajulujun|wajulujun]] || [[word:wajulushun|wajulushun]] || [[word:wajulukun|wajulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wajuluthuoro|wajuluthuoro]] || [[word:wajulujuoro|wajulujuoro]] || [[word:wajulushuoro|wajulushuoro]] || [[word:wajulukuoro|wajulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
